selection_rules: Use only active skills whose trigger_conditions match the current task.
Prefer the smallest skill set that materially improves execution.
Prefer Devin-installed skills in /workspace/.agents/skills/ for executable procedures.
Use factory_promoted skills only after promotion_manager has recorded approval.
Do not use draft, disabled, or deprecated skills without explicit coordinator approval.
Record selected skill ids in SubagentTask.selected_skill_refs when dispatching child sessions.
